result:
Implemented first-class task toggling in [main.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main.go) and documented it in [README.md](/home/changkun/null-codex/README.md).

`tasks` still lists open tasks, but now includes file line numbers, and `tasks toggle <id> <line>` flips the Markdown checkbox in place while recording history through the existing versioned write path. On the web side, I added `POST /tasks/toggle`, made note-page task checkboxes interactive, and turned `/tasks` into a clickable task dashboard instead of a read-only list.

I also updated [main_test.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main_test.go) to cover CLI toggling, interactive task rendering, and the web toggle POST flow.

I couldn’t run `gofmt` or `go test ./...` here because the sandbox doesn’t have `go`/`gofmt` installed.
